series_metadata.series_description: Student and Instructor records which may include: proof of medical insurance, medical physical (NFPA 1582) exam results. Fire Chief letter, copy of diploma, college transcript, COMPASS test results, ACT/SAT results, copy of NIS IS-100 certificate, copy of NIMS IS-700 certificate, OFA Code of Conduct form, OFA Emergency Contact Form, test results and grades, skill sheets, 3rd attempt paperwork, incident report, substandard training report, attendance records, missed time report and make up documentation, course evaluations, file inventory forms, course non-complete documents, course schedule, honor student letter, graduation program, registration application records, objective check off sheets, copy of driver’s license, photo/video release, graduation press release, student waiver, TB test results, vaccination records, drug screen results, Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) form, firefighter certification, employment verification letter, statement of qualification form, pre-knowledge cognitive exam results, pre-requisite skills verification, non-identifying student medical clinical assessments, IFSAC applications, IFSAC skills sheets, OFA course score sheets, copy of ODPS application, copy of orientation letter, student teaching form, and student teaching evaluations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until confirmation data has been entered in database and checked for quality and completeness, then destroy paper copy. ; Microform: Retain for seven years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain electronic data fifty years., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
